title: Autopay Silently Drains $1,700 From You Every Year
hook: You turned on autopay to simplify life — and it just switched off the part of your brain that notices when you're being overcharged.
angle: Autopay removes the 'pain of payment' that acts as a natural spending brake, enabling zombie subscriptions and unnoticed price hikes — yet every finance guru tells you to set it up
audience: Anyone with autopay enabled who has never audited their recurring charges
key_numbers: 7 forgotten autopay charges per household on average
81% of Americans pay for at least one service they forgot about
23% less likely to cancel after a price hike when on autopay
